Sec. 1  
In 2019, the Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh was Chandrababu Naidu. He belonged to the Telugu Desam Party. His leadership was marked by infrastructure development and economic reforms.

Sec. 3  
His tenure ended in 2019 with the formation of the new government. Y. S. Jagan Mohan Reddy took over as the Chief Minister. The political landscape shifted significantly during this time.
